mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_dispute (order_id, initiator_id, respondent_id, reason, evidence_urls, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{initiatorId}, #{respondentId}, #{reason}, #{evidenceUrls}, 'negotiating')
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, o.order_no, (SELECT oi.product_name FROM t_order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.id LIMIT 1) AS product_name, u1.nickname AS initiator_name, u2.nickname AS respondent_name FROM t_dispute d LEFT JOIN t_order o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN t_user u1 ON d.initiator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN t_user u2 ON d.respondent_id = u2.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.*, o.order_no, (SELECT oi.product_name FROM t_order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.id LIMIT 1) AS product_name, u1.nickname AS initiator_name, u2.nickname AS respondent_name FROM t_dispute d LEFT JOIN t_order o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN t_user u1 ON d.initiator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN t_user u2 ON d.respondent_id = u2.id WHERE d.initiator_id = #{userId} OR d.respondent_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
SELECT d.*, o.order_no FROM t_dispute d LEFT JOIN t_order o ON d.order_id = o.id WHERE d.status = #{status} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_dispute SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_dispute WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
